rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement

rulings.Case Title: GEE WAY WONG VS. HUNG CHUN LEUNG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Gee Way Wong And Sau Hon Lau Wong'S Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, July 30, 2009, line 10, Plaintiffs Gee Way Wong and Sau Hon Lau Wong's Order to Show Cause regarding Preliminary Injunction (per ex parte Order of 7/17/09). Preliminary injunction is granted. Plaintiff is likely to prevail on the merits and will experience great and irreparable harm without an injunction. The undisputed evidence is that Leung forged the deed. Plaintiff must post a bond in the amount of $2,000. There is no nexus between the interest claimed and the injunction. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN DALE PERCELLE VS. SWANSON, MCNAMARA & HALLER et al (Provide Access)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Punitive Damages, Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, July 30, 2009, line 11, DEFENDANT SWANSON, MCNAMARA & HALLER, MARY MCNAMARA, AUGUST GUGELMANN Motion To Strike Punitive Damages. Motion to strike is off calendar as moot in view of ruling on demurrer. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN DALE PERCELLE VS. SWANSON, MCNAMARA & HALLER et al (Provide Access)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, July 30, 2009, line 11, DEFENDANT SWANSON, MCNAMARA & HALLER, MARY MCNAMARA, AUGUST GUGELMANN DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to establish and plead actual innocence in a post conviction proceeding. Plaintiff's actual innocence of the underlying criminal charges is a necessary element of the malpractice cause of action. (See Redante vs. Yockelson (2003) 112 Cal.App. 4th 1351, 1357). Request for stay is denied. Claim does not accrue until plaintiff established his actual innocence. No reasonable possibility of curing defect by amendment. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. HERCILIA JANET GIRALDO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, July 30, 2009, line 16, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Motion for summary judgment is denied. Triable issue of fact raised whether defendant is in possession of the property. Motion for summary adjudication is granted in part and denied in part. Granted as to affirmative defenses 3f. Discrimination, 3i(1). Habitability, 3i(4). Failure to make reasonable accomodation, 3i(5). Failure to comply with Civil Code section 2923.5, 3. Fraud, 4. and 5. Failure to take Loss Mitigation Steps, 3i(2). Failure to allege facts to state a cause of action, and 1. Standing. Summary adjudication is denied as to 3d. Plaintiff waived changed or cancelled notice to quit and 3i(3). Estoppel by conduct because a triable issue of fact raised regarding whether defendant properly served and whether plaintiff waived or is estopped from pursuing this action. (Declaration of defendant Giraldo.). =(302/CWW)
